election.title: BV2140 — Ranked Robin worked example — most pairwise wins, with no Condorcet winner
election.description: The electowiki Ranked Robin worked example (electowiki.org/wiki/Ranked_Robin). 35 voters, five candidates (Ava, Bianca, Cedric, Deegan, Eli) on ranked ballots that use EQUAL rankings (e.g. Ava=Bianca=Cedric). Ranked Robin (Copeland) compares every pair head-to-head and elects whoever wins the most matchups: Ava wins 3 of 4 and is elected — even though there is NO Condorcet winner (Ava actually loses head-to-head to Bianca, 15-14). It shows Ranked Robin picking the strongest all-round candidate when nobody beats everyone. The LH tabulation engine reproduces the same pairwise matrix and winner.

races.title: Ranked Robin worked example — most pairwise wins, with no Condorcet winner
